<!-- Thanks for contributing to QuestBoard! -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] perf — performance
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] docs — documentation
- [ ] ci / chore — tooling

## Scope

- [ ] Contract (`contracts/`)
- [ ] Web (`web/`)
- [ ] Server (`server/`)
- [ ] Client bindings (`packages/`)
- [ ] Docs (`docs/`)

## Contract changes (if applicable)

- [ ] No storage layout / ABI break, **or** the break is documented and bindings regenerated
- [ ] New/changed behavior covered by unit tests

## Quality gates

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`, `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, `cargo test` pass
- [ ] `pnpm lint`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm build` pass
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant
